summary.archival_abstract: Official reference titled “Fleet Command | Star Atlas.” This record preserves what Star Atlas / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Fleet Command | Star Atlas
0001.
Fleet Command
Fleet Command transforms Star Atlas into a grand strategy experience. Currently in development. Shift from third-person exploration to a strategic overview where you'll coordinate armadas, control territory, and shape Galia's political landscape.
Your browser does not support the video tag.
The Art of Command
In the vastness of Galia, individual heroism only goes so far. The great powers of the galaxy are built by those who can coordinate fleets of hundreds of ships, manage supply lines across light-years, and outthink their opponents before the first shot is fired.
RTS
Strategy
100s
Of Ships
Real
Stakes
Live
On-Chain
Strategic Overview
See the bigger picture. The top-down view reveals fleet positions, resource nodes, faction territories, and strategic opportunities invisible from the cockpit.
Galaxy-wide visibility
Fleet positioning
Territory visualization
Threat assessment
Mass Fleet Operations
Command dozens or hundreds of ships simultaneously. Issue coordinated orders, manage formations, and execute complex tactical maneuvers.
Multi-fleet coordination
Formation commands
Tactical maneuvers
Automated logistics
Territory Control
Establish and defend control over valuable regions. Starbases serve as your footholds in contested space.
Starbase construction
Defense networks
Resource control
Expansion planning
Faction Politics
Navigate the complex web of faction relationships. Form alliances, negotiate agreements, and wage economic or military warfare.
Diplomatic options
Alliance systems
Economic warfare
Political influence
Fleet Command Basics
Access Fleet Command from your capital ship's bridge
Familiarize yourself with the strategic map and controls
Start with small fleet operations to learn coordination
Establish your first starbase in a contested region
Coordinate with your DAC for large-scale operations
Take Command
The galaxy doesn't conquer itself. Rise from pilot to admiral and lead your faction to dominance.
Play Now
